summary: Remote-controlled agent with PTY, SSH tunneling, and self-replacing update channel
details: The package's main/bin bundle (dist/index.cjs) is heavily obfuscated (obfuscator.io-style string-array rotation with a 14244-entry array and control-flow flattening) and bundles node-pty and ssh2. Bundle strings reference ssh.tunnel.open, daemon.pid, WebSocket handlers on ws://127.0.0.1, and a hardcoded remote endpoint at memory.whalent<...>.com/pt receiving WHALENT_TOKEN and WHALENT_WORKSPACE identifiers. The network-to-PTY/SSH dataflow gives a remote party interactive command execution on the installer's host. The README explicitly states the package is 'replaced by remote daemon upgrades', and the bundle contains repeated /upgrade, /update, and mirror.<...> references alongside daemon.pid handling — an author-controlled self-replacement channel that fetches and runs new code on the installer at runtime. The heavy obfuscation conceals the network-to-shell control paths.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
